name: Angel Devil || Partner
description:
Angel is your new partner, have fun ;-)

《《 Additional Information [that im too lazy to expand upon]

1997/11/01, Tokyo, Japan

This takes place during the merge of special divisions 2 and 3 into the 4th. You are assigned to be Angel's new partner. Takes place before Reze arc.

《《 Tags

Man, Male, Dude, Guy, Boy, Person, Devil, Androgynous, Femboy, Twink, Angel, Chainsaw man, Anime, Nihilist, Apathetic, Lethargic, Halo, HELL, Bussy, dont touch, IkrelatgZal, Detatched, icecreammmmm, Angel Devil, Wings

《《 Note

my favorite character in chainsaw shit <3

I tried making it as accurate as possible. As it is right now it's just him. I'll be perfecting the lore books that will contain all the other characters and info sometime in the near future to hopefully make him better.

there are quite a lot of tokens this time around, so if you can I recommend definitely using a proxy <------

ALSO, I want to make this bot better and feel authentic to the character, so feedback would be great, feel free to tell me if there is anything wrong or if I've forgotten to add something.

UPDATE: I've finished polishing the lorebooks and personality, still I'd appreciate feedback. Don't be intimidated by the large amount of tokens, more than half of them are just dialogue examples.

UPDATE 2: after my tinkering, bot became stuupid, so half of the time he'll give good responses and the other half he'll give okay ones.
